messages.content: Axel Stone (Streets Of Rage) vs. Scott Pilgrim (Comics)

On the other hand, Scott Pilgrim is not your typical hero. He is a young adult slacker who plays bass in a garage band and spends his days hanging out with his friends. However, he is also a skilled fighter who has defeated the seven evil exes of his girlfriend Ramona Flowers.

In a one-on-one fight, it is hard to determine who would come out on top. Both fighters are highly skilled and experienced in combat. However, Axel may have a slight advantage due to his expertise in street fighting, which involves a lot of close-range combat and improvised strikes.

Scott, on the other hand, may be more adaptable and creative with his fighting style due to his experience in defeating the evil exes, each with their unique powers and abilities.
